description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style toolbox with a robust frame featuring black metal edges and light wood panels on all sides. The top surface is flat and bordered by a black metallic trim, giving it a sturdy and modern appearance. On the front, there is a single, centered black handle, likely made of metal, designed for easy lifting or pulling. Both shorter sides also have large, rectangular black handles, which appear to be folding and are attached with visible hardware. The box is seamless with no visible hinges or latches on the exterior, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty urban or workshop environments.
description: A rectangular toolbox with black metal framing and light wood panels, featuring sturdy black handles on the front and sides. Its industrial design is both functional and visually robust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main black handle centered on the light wood panel, framed by black metal edges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a large, rectangular black handle attached to the short end, with the wood panel and black frame visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wood panel framed in black metal, no handles or hardware visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a large black handle on the short end.
attribute_handle_type: Three rectangular, folding metal handles: one centered on the front panel and one on each short side, all made of black steel with a flat grip and no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism on the exterior; the lid appears to be a simple lift-off or friction-fit design.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal or external compartments, trays, or dividers are visible; the box appears to be a single large compartment.
